sections.heading: FAQ overview
paragraphs: Get quick answers to common Game of Darts questions.
Use this section for quick answers to how Game of Darts works across modes, settings, and access.

faq.question: Is Game of Darts available on the App Store?
faq.answer: Yes. The website metadata marks Game of Darts as Live and includes the public App Store link.

faq.question: Which modes are available in this release?
faq.answer: Match/X01, Cricket, Snooker, Bob's 27, 1 to 20, Hare & Hound, Halve It, and All 5s are currently the featured modes.

faq.question: Does Game of Darts support DartBot?
faq.answer: Yes. DartBot is available in Match play with Pro, DartBot-only unlock, or 48-hour access.

faq.question: Do leaderboards and achievements require Game Center?
faq.answer: Yes. Leaderboards and achievements require Game Center sign-in.

faq.question: Does Game of Darts use BarkinMad Coins?
faq.answer: This release uses Pro, DartBot, 48-hour access, and ad-supported play for premium features.

faq.question: Why do some pages use similar artwork?
faq.answer: Some pages currently use shared Game of Darts artwork while dedicated screenshots are added.
